subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The All-Merciful consoleth thee in that which hath befallen thee in My straight Path. Verily, We have remembered every community that hath believed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان الروف یعزیک فیما ورد علیک فی سبیلی المستقیم انا ذکرنا کل امه آمنت
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
